overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial sci-fi facility. The character moves from a small workshop room through a doorway into a larger corridor featuring a massive circular vault door.

scene_state.functional_zone: small workshop with computer terminal and machinery

events.description: character approaches doorway leading to larger industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: character walks around the workshop examining the robotic machinery and computer equipment

entered.detail: desk with old CRT monitor and electronic equipment against the right wall
yellow industrial robotic arm mounted on the workbench
stack of sealed cardboard boxes on the floor
screen displaying data mounted on the left wall
long fluorescent light hanging from the ceiling
metal door frame leading to the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character explores a compact workshop room filled with electronic equipment. A workbench with a robotic assembly arm dominates the right side while cardboard boxes sit stacked on the left. The character moves toward the doorway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with massive vault door

events.description: exits workshop and enters large industrial corridor with metal grating floor
character slows while approaching the large circular vault door

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial corridor toward the massive vault door at the end

notable_agents.action: distant figure in blue clothing standing near machinery on the left side of the corridor

entered.detail: massive rust-colored circular door with mechanical locking mechanism
large metal pipes running along the ceiling
metal catwalk flooring with yellow safety stripes
stacked industrial containers on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a spacious industrial corridor with metal grating floors and overhead pipes. A massive circular vault door dominates the far end of the room. Another figure can be seen standing near equipment on the left side as the character approaches the vault.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a cluttered workshop into the vast scale of an industrial corridor. It begins inside a compact room filled with electronic equipment, passing a robotic assembly arm on the right and stacked cardboard boxes on the left as the character advances. As the character reaches the far end of the room, the scene opens through a doorway into a spacious hallway characterized by metal grating floors and overhead pipes. The perspective then expands to reveal a massive circular vault door dominating the distance, passing another figure stationed by equipment on the left before finally approaching the vault.
